✨ A Magical Day ✨
Happy Birthday,
Era 🎂
🎁 A little gift, just for you 🎂

Era, you are someone truly rare —
the kind of person who lights up every room
just by being herself. 🌸

Your kindness, your strength, your smile —
they inspire everyone around you more than you know.

Never stop chasing your dreams, because you have
everything it takes to make them real. ✨

Today is your day — own it, celebrate it,
and know that you are deeply valued. 💖

— Happy Birthday Era, keep shining! 🌟
💖 Memories & A Secret Letter 💖
🌸First smile
🌙Moonlit nights
☕Morning coffee
🌺Spring blooms
✨Star gazing
🦋Free spirit
— A Locked Letter For Era —
🔒

Inside this envelope rests something written
only for your eyes, Era.
Enter the passkey to unlock it.

That's not quite right, love... try again 💔

💌

— With all my love 💕
